channel.title: F# on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in F# on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: RT.Assistant: A Multi-Agent Voice Bot Using .NET and OpenAI
item.description:
The post describes RT.Assistant, a real-time multi-agent voice bot built with .NET, F#, Microsoft.Extensions.AI, .NET MAUI, and the OpenAI Realtime API. It is presented as a guest blog post on the .NET Blog.

  • Source: .NET
